//: Per-site MCP servers for design/UI generation. Copy this file to the site repo root as `.mcp.json`. Claude Code loads it automatically each session. Secrets are read from environment variables (set them as environment secrets in the Claude Code web config — see _shared/TECH-STACK.md). Delete any server you don't use.

magic.//: 21st.dev Magic — AI UI component generation. Needs TWENTYFIRST_API_KEY.

v0.//: Optional: Vercel v0 UI generation. Needs V0_API_KEY. Remove if unused.
